view.title: Validate explicit UC need #12
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 12 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a `customer.created` event leads to a POST to the company CRM, resulting in a new lead in Salesforce. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this integration is functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but without specific evidence of its implementation, the validation remains inconclusive.
